name: Pain Painter
desc: This card's name becomes "Plaguespreader Zombie" while on the field. Once per turn: You can target up to 2 Zombie monsters you control, except this card; they become Level 2 (until the end of this turn), and if they do, they cannot be used as Synchro Material, except for the Synchro Summon of a Zombie monster.
mnst_eff: This card's name becomes "Plaguespreader Zombie" while on the field. Once per turn: You can target up to 2 Zombie monsters you control, except this card; they become Level 2 (until the end of this turn), and if they do, they cannot be used as Synchro Material, except for the Synchro Summon of a Zombie monster.
eff: This card's name becomes "Plaguespreader Zombie" while on the field. Once per turn: You can target up to 2 Zombie monsters you control, except this card; they become Level 2 (until the end of this turn), and if they do, they cannot be used as Synchro Material, except for the Synchro Summon of a Zombie monster.

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
summoning: Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
